task.title: Absorb stronger implementation depth
task.why: Compare implementation patterns from /tmp/retort-planet-demo.

task.title: Absorb better user experience
task.why: Extract usable UX improvements from /tmp/retort-planet-demo.

task.title: Absorb better operational gates
task.why: Adapt CI and release checks from /tmp/retort-planet-demo.

task.title: Adopt deterministic review pipeline stages
task.why: External project has explicit review pipeline signals; Retort should turn absorption into staged discovery, localization, reflection, and tasking.

task.title: Add external file grouping before deep comparison
task.why: External project suggests grouping changed or related files before expensive reasoning, improving depth without broad noisy scans.

task.title: Add absorption quality benchmark counters
task.why: External project has benchmark or precision/recall signals; Retort should measure whether absorbed tasks actually improve later scores.

task.title: Expose Retort absorption through plugin friendly commands
task.why: External project exposes plugin or CLI surfaces; Retort should keep blackhole UI and automation APIs aligned.
